name: SCC_CreatePreChargeReq_ISO
title: SCC_CreatePreChargeReq_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreatePreChargeReq_ISO ( byte SessionID[], byte StatusFlags[], char ErrorCode[], float TargetVoltage, float TargetCurrent )
description: Creates a PreCharge Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
